datasetAgreementGeneral: The SEER (Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results) program of the National Cancer Institute provides information on cancer statistics. Access is strictly controlled under the Privacy Act of 1974 and HIPAA 1996. Unauthorised disclosure will be prosecuted to the full extent of the law.
term1: You agree that all statements and methods in your research proposal are complete and accurate.
term2: You will not use the data for any purpose other than that described in your approved research proposal.
term3: You will not permit others to use the data except for authorised collaborators directly involved in the described research.
term4: You agree to implement appropriate technical and administrative safeguards to protect the confidentiality of the data at all times.
term5: You accept that any breach of these terms will result in immediate revocation of access and potential legal action.
